docket_entries.description: MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON MAR-22-2017 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/PETITIONER RUBYJEAN VELASCO'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE WITH A DEFERRED PAYMENT THAT IS DUE BY 4/14/17. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: TERI L. JACKSON; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
